name: rldyour-serena-mcp
description: Serena MCP workflow layer for Codex: semantic code inspection, high-signal project memory sync, plans, research archives, and lifecycle hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Serena-first code workflow and memory sync
interface.longDescription: This plugin defines the rldyour Serena MCP workflow for Codex. It does not declare a duplicate Serena MCP transport; the server is expected to come from rldyour-mcps. The plugin provides two skills: serena-code-workflow for semantic code inspection and editing through Serena MCP tools, and serena-memory-sync for high-signal fact-only updates to .serena/memories plus selected plans and research archives. Memory files must preserve source-of-truth paths, entry points, current behavior, invariants, change rules, verification commands, and unresolved gaps so future Codex sessions can implement with high confidence. Hook scripts add Serena-first reminders for code prompts, mark memory sync requirements after git commit-like changes, and use Stop continuation prompts to keep project knowledge current without spawning a separate sync agent.
defaultPrompt: Use Serena for this code investigation.
Sync Serena memories after this task.
